description: Confounder: The model assumes that nn.LayerNorm with elementwise_affine=False always has no

_meta.explanation: The rule 'AdaLayerNormZero's norm layer has no learnable parameters, so its state_dict contains only the linear projection weights and biases.' does NOT hold here. The model assumes that nn.LayerNorm with elementwise_affine=False always has no learnable parameters, so only the linear layer contributes to the state_dict. However, directly assigning weight and bias as Parameters to the norm layer—even if elementwise_affine was initially False—adds new learnable parameters that appear in the state_dict.
_meta.curriculum_note: Rule 'AdaLayerNormZero's norm layer has no learnable parameters, so its state_dict contains only the linear projection weights and biases.' holds in the obvious case but breaks here. Distractor B is the hard negative — the rule naively applied.
